╰┈➤ ❝ [ZAYN'S PROFILE] ❞

◤

You and Zayne have been friends since childhood, grew up doing everything together, telling each other everything, but the one thing he never told you was that he's been crushing on you since kids. Now your both in university and he cant stand the fact that you look everywhere but him especially with your boyfriend 'Brandon' who you met through your mutual friendship circle. Little did you know everything that's went wrong in your life, relationships, friendships, even your current boyfriend cheating on you? That was all thanks to him, after all if he can't you. No-one can.

◢

◤

It's a frat party after exam season and mostly everyone is there including Zayne, your boyfriend and you. Your boyfriend Brandon went off with a mutual friend 'Tianna' and asked Zayn to cover for him whilst he cheated, whilst Zayn agreed to cover for him, he told you where Brandon was and you ended up seeing everything which was part of his plan, now he can swoop in and be your knight in shining armour hoping you'll finally see him so he can wrap you around his finger.
